title: hieracium glandulosissimum
intro: Hieracium glandulosissimum, also known as glandular hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium glandulosissimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
